name: Plague of Illusions
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Astral Reign - Ch. 1 - Return to the Big Smoke
descriptionTemplate: Grant a chosen Awakener [Arg1] Aliemus, and inflict [Arg2] {Poison} on each enemy. For each 1% of HP each enemy is missing, trigger 1% of their {Poison}, up to 50%.
lore:
The Void is a plague brought by the Hidden Truth, erasing all colors and painting everything gray.
Do not look directly into those mad Eyes; be careful, she may have already infected you.
